title: Pre-allow skill scripts in allowedTools
description: Local skills support allowedTools in SKILL.md frontmatter, but $PLUGIN_ROOT is unavailable for local skills — only absolute paths work. The skill runs scripts/copy-compact-cmd.sh via Bash, which triggers a permission prompt every time. As a plugin, $PLUGIN_ROOT resolves to the plugin install directory, enabling relative paths like $PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/copy-compact-cmd.sh. Goal: no permission prompts for scripts the skill will always run.
close_reason: Added allowed-tools frontmatter using ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/copy-compact-cmd.sh. Needs testing when plugin is installed.

title: Migrate shrink from local skill to plugin
description: Move shrink from ~/.claude/skills/shrink/ to a proper plugin. Benefits: $PLUGIN_ROOT for allowedTools (relative paths instead of absolute), plugin settings for per-project config (devlog/docs toggles and paths). This is the core migration task — the reason this repo exists.
close_reason: Plugin structure created: manifest at .claude-plugin/plugin.json, skill at skills/shrink/SKILL.md, hooks registered via hooks/hooks.json. PLUGIN_ROOT now available for script references.

title: Verify recommendation column in shrink audit table
description: The audit table should show what the orchestrator recommends for each item. Status: likely already done. The current SKILL.md already has Rec and Alt columns in the audit table. Verify by checking the actual audit output — if Rec/Alt are populated correctly, close this issue.
close_reason: Verified: Rec/Alt columns already present in SKILL.md (lines 50-71). Working correctly.

title: PostToolUse hook: suggest /shrink on branch switch
description: Upstream design question — not a code change yet. When Bash output contains 'Switched to a new branch', inject a reminder to consider /shrink via PostToolUse hook's additionalContext. Deferred because the difference between context injection vs stderr/stdout feedback in hooks needs discussion first.

title: Add --force flag to skip compact and force clear
description: Low priority. Add a --force flag to /shrink that forces /clear instead of offering compact. For rare cases where user wants to clear regardless of C items. Currently, any C items force /compact regardless of --clear flag.

title: File FR: programmable prompt suggestions
description: Upstream feature request — file on github.com/anthropics/claude-code. Claude Code's prompt suggestions (grayed-out Tab-to-accept text) are auto-generated and not configurable. Use case: after shrink/compact, suggest the command to read session context. Currently impossible — no API for custom suggestions.

title: Add per-topic devlog tracking
description: Add a devlog system distinct from documentation. Devlog tracks topic lifecycle (how topics start, end, what happened) and accumulates across sessions. Per-topic entries, not per-session. Devlog folder location set via plugin settings (per-project scope). If unset, prompt user to create. If empty/missing, skip. Documentation (knowledge notes) and devlog (logs) are two separate categories.

title: File FR: trigger /compact or /clear from hooks
description: Upstream feature request — file on github.com/anthropics/claude-code. Hooks can react to compact/clear events but cannot trigger them. Use case: auto-trigger /shrink then /compact on branch switch. Currently impossible — hooks can only inject context or block, not invoke commands.

title: Research: is shrink option A (TaskCreate) still needed?
description: Option A in ABCD categorization was originally TaskCreate (create session-scoped tasks). Renamed to Action — resolve directly now. In practice, user always uses B (beads) or C (continue), never A. Research: what use case does A serve? Should it be removed or replaced? If removed, categorization becomes BCD.

title: Add allowed-tools frontmatter field
description: The /shrink skill is missing the allowed-tools field in its SKILL.md frontmatter. DCI commands (the !backtick syntax) go through Bash permission checks and need to be pre-approved. Related to the PLUGIN_ROOT issue but this is about adding the frontmatter field itself. Can be done together with that issue after migration.
close_reason: Added allowed-tools field to SKILL.md frontmatter: Bash(copy-compact-cmd), Bash(git:*), Read, Write, Edit.

title: Clean up MEMORY.md duplication and clipboard helper
description: Two sub-issues: (1) MEMORY.md duplication — Several entries in the auto-memory MEMORY.md are duplicated in rules files, wasting context tokens. (2) Clipboard chain duplication — The pbcopy/xclip/clip.exe chain appears in both hooks/pre-compact.sh and scripts/copy-compact-cmd.sh. Extract to a shared helper script.

title: Bug: session-context.md not removed after compaction
description: The pre-compact hook should clean up session-context.md after compaction, but the file persists. Observed at ~/.claude/projects/<encoded-path>/memory/session-context.md. The hook copies a cat+rm command to clipboard, but user may not paste it, or the rm may fail silently. Possible causes: user skips paste, path encoding issues, hook doesn't fire, race condition.
